# freeipa_vault (Resource)

Manages FreeIPA Vaults. Upright CRUD resource for the vault itself. Use `freeipa_vault_owner` and `freeipa_vault_member` to manage permissions.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the vault (cn).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the vault.
- `type` (String) Type of the vault: standard, symmetric, asymmetric.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique name of the vault.
